selection.selection_note: Judged only repaired icon batches 28 and 29 against standard_source_table semantic_brief plus S-101/OpenCPN/provider witnesses and actual repaired SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: TSSCRS51 is traffic crossing area. Required geometry is the traffic crossing/caution marker silhouette from the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses, not a generic buoy, beacon, or route arrow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. Helm line weight and ring size are style differences; do not mark final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta traffic crossing marker with circular enclosure and vertical exclamation-like crossing cue. It preserves the traffic-area family and reads like the S-101/OpenCPN witness at small size.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: TSSLPT51 is traffic direction in a one way lane of a traffic separation scheme. Required geometry is one clear lane arrow in the traffic-magenta family.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. Outline-vs-filled treatment is an acceptable Helm style difference because the one-way upward arrow semantics are clear.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a single upward magenta lane arrow. Directionality, one-way count, and traffic-separation class match the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: TSSRON51 is traffic roundabout. Required geometry is a roundabout/circular traffic direction arrow, not a generic dashed box or ordinary circular area.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. Helm simplifies the S-101 sweep but preserves the required roundabout semantics.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta circular traffic roundabout arrow. It preserves the circular motion, arrow head, and traffic roundabout family from the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: TWRDEF51 is a two way route of a traffic separation scheme with direction not defined in the data. Required geometry is reciprocal/paired route arrows plus an undefined-direction cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. The exact dash spacing differs from S-101, but the route class, reciprocal geometry, and question-mark undefined cue are present.
verdicts.observed: Candidate shows reciprocal traffic-route arrowheads with central route marks and flanking question marks. The undefined-direction cue and two-way traffic-route class match the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: TWRTPT52 is reciprocal traffic directions in a two-way route of a traffic separation scheme. Required geometry is paired opposing route arrows, not a single direction symbol.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. The candidate is a simplified Helm redraw, but the opposing-arrow semantics are clear.
verdicts.observed: Candidate shows paired reciprocal up/down arrowheads with central route ticks. It preserves the two-way reciprocal directionality from the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: TWRTPT53 is single traffic direction in a two-way route part of a traffic separation scheme. Required geometry is a single route-direction arrow with two-way-route context, not a reciprocal pair.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. The simplified dashed stem is acceptable because the single-arrow variant is not confused with TWRTPT52.
verdicts.observed: Candidate shows one traffic-direction arrowhead over a dashed route stem. It preserves the single-direction-in-two-way-route semantics from the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: WRECKS01 is wreck showing any portion of hull or superstructure at level of chart datum. Required geometry is the recognized exposed-wreck hull/superstructure silhouette from S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: Visual/semantic rerun pass only. The candidate now matches the marine-standard wreck variant closely enough for human final review.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black exposed-wreck silhouette with low horizontal hull and sloped wreckage/mast. The bad white circular aperture is gone and the symbol no longer reads as a generic sail or decorative icon.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.
